engaged_works.title: Phaenomenologie Des Geistes
engaged_works.ascription_notes: Routed from the 2026-05-10 Tier-1 publication backlog as an on-disk source witness.
engaged_works.summary: This on-disk text is being wired into the Source tab as a citation witness for G. W. F. Hegel, Phaenomenologie Des Geistes. The entry is intentionally minimal: it records the routed file and basic bibliographic shape so the site can surface the source while fuller review waits. A later pass should tighten the title, edition, and passage coverage against the on-disk witness.

core_thesis: Hegel's central claim is that substance is truly actual only as subject: the true is the whole insofar as it becomes itself through mediation, not as a static given ([Phenomenology of Spirit Preface §17](cite://hegel/phenomenology-of-spirit/17); [§18](cite://hegel/phenomenology-of-spirit/18)). Hence determinacy is internally unstable; each finite position passes over into another through determinate negation ([Phenomenology of Spirit §79](cite://hegel/phenomenology-of-spirit/79); [Science of Logic, Being-Nothing-Becoming](cite://hegel/science-of-logic/being-nothing-becoming)). Freedom is Spirit's achieved self-relation in and through this movement.

cross_engagements.brief: Akalanka presses the same substrate structure axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `many-coordinate-reals` rather than `one-self-standing`.
Abhinavagupta presses the same determination axis in the logical-dialectical register, but with the value `self-expression` rather than `negation-and-contradiction`.
Akshapada Gautama presses the same method axis in the methodological register, but with the value `formal-proof-or-inference` rather than `dialectical-development`.
Gaudapada (Sankhya commentator) presses the same temporal mode axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `substance-primary` rather than `process-primary`.
Alfred North Whitehead presses the same evolution register axis in the historical-genealogical register, but with the value `durational-creative-growth` rather than `sublative-becoming`.
Adi Sankara presses the same truth-structure axis in the epistemological register, but with the value `hierarchical-standpoint-truth` rather than `single-absolute-truth`.
Baladeva Vidyabhushana presses the same perspectivism axis in the epistemological register, but with the value `partial-perspectives-ranked` rather than `sublated-into-higher-whole`.
Jagadguru Ramabhadracharya presses the same normativity axis in the ethical register, but with the value `divine-command-or-grace` rather than `ethical-life-in-institutions`.
Haridas Chaudhuri presses the same social formation axis in the political-social register, but with the value `civilizational-structure-shift` rather than `recognitive-institutional`.
Anandabodha presses the same soteric end axis in the soteriological register, but with the value `identity-with-ground` rather than `recognition-or-freedom`.
Bannanje Govindacharya presses the same individuation status axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `irreducible-dependent` rather than `reducible-to-the-whole`.
